creator: glocke@bsdstammtisch.at
text:
Am Monday 15 October 2012 22:00:10 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of net-p2p/retroshare,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/172731 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/172731
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 

Hi, 

sorry for the trouble with the email addresses, that's why I changed 
it to peter@netkey.at. I hoped to simplify the whole email sending 
shebang. Didn't work out obviously :)

Could you kindly approve the patch, please? 

Thanks Peter aka glocke
